arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Pep Guardiola DEMANDS €100m Jamie Gittens signing
arts.sum: Real Madrid are also interested in signing the 20-year-old, despite their current attacking riches, but they could miss out on a deal as Guardiola has ordered Man City to “pay whatever they have to pay to sign him.” Pep Guardiola has ordered Manchester City to pay whatever it takes to re-sign Borussia Dortmund winger Jamie Gittens, according to a sensational report from Spain.

arts.sum: Erling Haaland returned to Man City training ahead of the Premier League clash with Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs. Man City: What English football feat could the Lilywhites set against the Premier League champions?
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have the opportunity to create a new English footballing record when they face Manchester City in the Premier League on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: “Would be ideal” – Player urged to take ‘intermediate step’ before moving to Tottenham
arts.sum: At the weekend, Luka Vušković stated he’s confident that he should be at Tottenham Hotspur next season. In September 2023, Tottenham reached an agreement with Hajduk Split for the defender to arrive at the north London club in the summer of 2025, after he turns 18. Hajduk Split sent him on loan to Radomiak Radom The post “Would be ideal” – Player urged to take ‘intermediate step’ before moving to Tottenham appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: 'Appalling' Arsenal superstar has 'not been good enough at all' this season as the Gunners look set to come up short in Premier League title race, claims ex-Tottenham striker
arts.sum: The Arsenal skipper has come in for criticism after his display in the Gunners' 1-0 home defeat by West Ham , which looks to have ended any hope of the side claiming the Premier League this term.

arts.ttl: Sheikh Jassim has already made major Man United takeover decision amid Tottenham links
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur-linked Qatari businessman Sheikh Jassim has dissolved his company Nine Two UK Holdings Limited, which was once linked with his proposed buyout of Manchester United. Paperwork to register Nine Two Holdings Limited in the UK was filed two months before Sheikh Jassim's last two offers for United with the decision to register his foundation more in preparation to have formalities in place were he chosen to be the preferred candidate.
